approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve instructed the Foundation builder to keep moving from repo truth while respecting approval-bound side effects; the builder selected the P0 provider-rotation proof blocker for safe no-secret preflight only.
scopeSummary: Create a no-secret provider-side rotation/retirement proof ledger from FUBZahnd App.config metadata, prove no raw values or hashes are stored, mark provider-side proof blocked/pending, and do not rotate, revoke, validate, or call providers.
notApproved: Do not rotate, revoke, retire, or validate provider credentials.
Do not store, print, hash, fingerprint, or quote raw credential values, connection strings, usernames, passwords, token lengths, or emails.
Do not call GitHub, Follow Up Boss, Ambition/KPI, SMTP, SQL Server, Supabase, or any provider API.
Do not mutate public repos, provider accounts, connector config, OpenClaw runtime, Drive, Gmail, ClickUp, Slack, Agent Feedback, or external systems.
Do not run live extraction, source crawls, model/provider calls, paid runs, hidden subagents, or parallel builders.
Do not mark SECURITY-PROVIDER-ROTATION-PROOF-001 or SECURITY-006 done.
